elements.title: The AI workspace that works for you. | Notion
elements.meta_description: Build Custom Agents, search across all your apps, and automate busywork. The AI workspace where teams get more done, faster.
elements.hero_subheadline: Notion is where your teams and AI agents capture knowledge, find answers, and automate projects. Now a team of 7 feels like 70.
h2s: Let Notion AI handle the busywork.
